[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011100100 4
1 011100000 3
2 001000100 2
3 011011100 5
4 010000000 1
5 001000100 2
6 011011001 5
7 010000100 2

01 10 010010100 3
12 21 010000100 2 match 7
23 32 011100000 3 match 1
34 43 011000000 2
45 54 011000110 4
56 65 011100000 3 match 1
67 76 001000000 1
70 07 001011101 5

02 20 011000100 3
13 31 010010000 2
24 42 011000100 3
35 53 011111000 5
46 64 011000000 2
57 75 001011100 4
60 06 011000000 2
71 17 000010100 2

03 30 011011001 5 match 6
14 41 010000100 2 match 7
25 52 011100100 4 match 0
36 63 011100000 3 match 1
47 74 001000100 2 match 2 5
50 05 011011100 5 match 3
61 16 010000000 1 match 4
72 27 001000100 2 match 2 5

04 40 011000100 3
15 51 010010100 3
26 62 011100000 3 match 1
37 73 001011001 4
